examples: VIG must nevertheless be integrated into a highly-insulating frame construction.
EXAMPLE: My software company earns an 0.2% vig on every transaction conducted through the use of our secure Internet shopping software.
Funds that do pay the vig get favorable customer visibility (see box, p. 219).
When you factor in the bookmaker's "vig"--the charge taken on bets--and the "wisdom of crowds, " breaking the bank is highly unlikely.
But for long-term growth, I expect VIG to offer better returns.
